summary: The phone call transcript reveals a significant application error that occurs while attempting to schedule a physical therapy appointment. This issue disrupts the user experience and prevents the caller from completing their request.

issues.evidence: An application error has occurred. Goodbye.
issues.why_it_matters: This error prevents the user from successfully scheduling an appointment, leading to frustration and potential loss of business.
issues.suggestion: Investigate the cause of the application error and implement a fix to ensure seamless appointment scheduling.
